notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Manny Machado reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Edouard Julien.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Manny Machado reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Edouard Julien.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Ezequiel Tovar. Manny Machado to 2nd. Manny Machado advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by shortstop Ezequiel Tovar.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman lines out sharply to left fielder Gavin Sheets.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Karros pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Karros singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Gavin Sheets.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman singles on a ground ball to right fielder Fernando Tatis Jr. Willi Castro scores. Brenton Doyle to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Karros pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Umpire reviewed (slide interference), call on the field was overturned: Kyle Karros grounds into a double play, second baseman Jake Cronenworth to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Tyler Freeman out at 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman hit by pitch. Brenton Doyle to 2nd.

notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman hit by pitch. Brenton Doyle to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Karros pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Karros grounds out, shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Gavin Sheets.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts hits a grand slam (2) to left field. Jake Cronenworth scores. Jackson Merrill scores. Manny Machado scores.

notableEvents.label: Manny Machado reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Manny Machado reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Edouard Julien.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Manny Machado steals (1) 3rd base. Xander Bogaerts steals (2) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Padres challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: pitcher Juan Mejia picks off Fernando Tatis Jr. at 2nd on throw to second baseman Willi Castro.
